description.value:
At 3rd level, you gain the ability to tap into the power of the Oozaru, temporarily giving you the strength of them but at the cost of losing complete control of yourself.

Your hair spikes up and a dark green aura persists across your being, representing the immense power your gain from Wrathful Form. You may enter this form as a Action or Bonus Action, twice per rest, for up to 1 minute. You can transform an additional time per rest at 11th level. You gain 1 rank of Berserk when you first activate this form and for it's duration you gain the following effects:

  • You gain a aura of light of your description, emitting 5 feet of bright light and 20 feet of dim light around you. Additionally, when you intiatially activate this form, you deal your [Unarmed Damage Die] in force damage to all creatures within 5 feet of you, knocking back affected creatures 5 feet. Finnally, you may spend up to a number of Ikari Dice equal to half your proficiency bonus, increasing the range you affect creatures and the knockback affected creatures receive by +5 for each Ikari Die spent.
  • You are unable to lose any ranks of Berserk while in this form unless you use your Control Mechanism (CM) or features in this transformation. When you use your CM, you automatically exit this form and lose all ranks of Berserk you have, gaining the usual temporary hit points when doing so. You are unable to use your CM during this form if you have at least a number of ranks of Berserk equal to your proficiency bonus.
  • At the end of your turn, you gain 1 rank of Berserk. Whenever you deal your Unarmed Damage, you deal an additional +2 damage for each rank of Berserk you have. Additionally, you reduce Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage by an amount equal to the total ranks of Berserk you have.
  • Your unarmed damage die becomes a 1d8. If your unarmed damage die is already higher, you instead increase it by +1 step.
  • Once per turn, whenever you deal your unarmed damage, you deal an adiditional amount of damage equal to 1 Ikari Die, this does not spend the die. at 7th level this becomes twice per turn. At 11th level, you instead deal additional damage equal to 2 Ikari Dice.
  • Your size category becomes large.
  • Whenever you make a Physical ability or skill check, you may spend 1 Ikari Die and add half the result of the die to the check. You increase the maximum amount of Ikari Dice you can spend on a check by +1 at 15th level.
  • Once per round, in place of a single unarmed attack, you may spend a minimum of 2 Ikari Dice to perform a Crush action. You make a Martial Arts check against the target creature's Atheletics or Martial Arts. On a success, you knock the target prone and deal your [Unarmed Damage Die], adding all spent Ikari Dice to the damage total.
  • 7th level, you gain resistance against effects that would move you against your will. This becomes immunity at 15th level.
  • 11th level, you may spend up to a number of Ikari Dice equal to half your current ranks of Berserk. For each Ikari Die you spend, you lose 1 rank of Berserk and 1 rank of a Physical or Elemental condition. You are unable to go below 1 rank of Berserk as a result of this feature.
  • 15th level, you can not be banished to another realm or teleported against your will in any way.
  • 18th level, you may spend 3 Ikari Dice and a Free Action to target a single creature of your choice that you can see, you mark that creature as your Wrathful Focus. While you have a creature marked as your Wrathful Focus, you may only target that creature, treating it as if they are the only creature you can see. Additionally, when you would gain a Ikari Die as a result of a action they did, you gain 1 additional Ikari Die. The creature remains marked as your Wrathful Focus until you exit this form or until you mark a new creature. If a creature deals damage against you that is not your Wrathful Focus, you may spend 2 Ikari Dice to mark that creature as your new Wrathful Focus.
